chapter_title.ar: باب مَا أَمَرَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِالنَّصِيحَةِ لِأَئِمَّةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ اللُّزُومِ لِجَمَاعَتِهِمْ وَ مَنْ هُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 103 – What the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> ordered with the advice of the Imams<sup>asws</sup> of the Muslims and the necessitation to their<sup>asws</sup> gatherings, and who they<sup>asws</sup> are

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/332)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/332)
text: مَنْ فَارَقَ جَمَاعَةَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ قِيدَ شِبْرٍ فَقَدْ خَلَعَ رِبْقَةَ الْإِسْلَامِ مِنْ عُنُقِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Abu Jameela, from Muhammad Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who separates from a group of Muslims by a limit of a palms width, so he has removed the bond of allegiance with Al-Islam from his neck’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn al-Faddal from abu Jamila from Muhammad al-Halabi from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Whoever would distance himself from the company the Muslims even by one shibr (one foot) he has removed the band of allegiance with Islam from his neck.”
